# Tags arraystring (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Tags arraystring. `json_extract_*_array` extracts a JSON array for `arrayexpand`/`array_any`.

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | alter tags_arr = json_extract_array(payload, "$.tags") | alter tags_str = arraystring(tags_arr, "|") | fields src, tags_str | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 9). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
